titleStmt.title: SII 40.109: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 109. (A.R. No. B. 88 of 1930.) Kōlaguṭla, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab lying in a field in the village.
This is dated Śaka 151[9], Durmukhi, Āshāḍha, śu. 11, Friday.
Records the gift of land as mānya in the village of Kōlagoṭla in the Nāgārjunikoṇḍa-sīma by a chief named Ghaṇṭa Daṇḍarāyaniṅgāru to Māllābhattu and Mallabhattu of Sattenapalle.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbbu
lu 1519 Agunēṭi duṁrmukhi nāma saṁvvatsaraṁ Āṣāḍha
śu 11 rājaśrī ghaṁṭadaṁḍarāyaniṁgāru satte
napalli mālabhattuṁḍu mallābhattuniṁgāriki yiccina
bhūdāna dhaṁrmmaśāsanaṁ māku sāgivacce nāgārju
ni koṁḍḍaśīmalonu kōlagoṭlagrāmāna sattenapalli
rājukuṁṭṭa cēnu koripāṭipecela kṣētraṁ
mīku mānyaṁgānu yistimi mī putra pau
tra pāraṁparyaṁ Ācaṁdrārkastāyigā
nu Anubhaviṁcci bratikēdi yi kṣētraṁ
yavvaḍu Āchadhana cēśinānu vāraṇāśi
lōnu gōbraṁhmaṁṇi vadhiṁccina pāpā
naṁbōduru yi kṣētraṁ yavvaru Āchedha
ceśinānu gāḍeda kaḍupuna puṭṭuduru kaḍa
ruṁ kakaḍupuna puṭṭuduru paḍamara gōgi
reḍḍivāri cēnigaṭṭu . vuttaraṁ bālaḍuvāri cēnu
geṭṭu dakṣiṇaṁ sarvabhaṭlu cenigaṭṭu tūrpu kaṁbhaṁ
Digital edition of SII 40.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
